languages.text: [Казнить полковника] "Полковник Иждриг Батошски, я обвиняю тебя в грехе сецессии, богохульстве неповиновения Терре и святотатстве нарушения клятвы. Сим я приговариваю тебя к казни".

[Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."
languages.original_text: [Казнить полковника] "Полковник Иждриг Батошски, я обвиняю тебя в грехе сецессии, богохульстве неповиновения Терре и святотатстве нарушения клятвы. Сим я приговариваю тебя к казни".

[Execute him] Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

[Execute him] Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

[Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

languages.text: [処刑せよ] [イズドリグ・バトシュスキー大佐。貴官を、卑劣なる離反の罪、テラへの抗命という冒涜、そして神聖な誓いを破った冒涜の罪で告発する。よって、ここに死刑を言い渡す」
languages.original_text: [Execute him] Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

traits.locale_text: [処刑せよ] イズドリグ・バトシュスキー大佐。貴官を、卑劣なる離反の罪、テラへの抗命という冒涜、そして神聖な誓いを破った冒涜の罪で告発する。よって、ここに死刑を言い渡す。

languages.text: [L'exécuter] « Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, je vous accuse du crime abject de sécession, de blasphème pour insubordination envers Terra, et de sacrilège pour avoir rompu votre serment. Votre punition sera la mort. »
languages.original_text: [Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

traits.locale_text: [L'exécuter] « Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, je vous accuse du crime abject de sécession, de blasphème pour insubordination envers Terra, et de sacrilège pour avoir rompu votre serment. Votre punition sera la mort. »

languages.text: [Onu infaz et] Albay İzdrig Batoshski; iğrenç bir şekilde ayrılıkçılıktan, Terra'ya itaatsizlikten ve yeminini bozma saygısızlığından suçlu bulundun. Seni ölüme mahkûm ediyorum."
languages.original_text: [Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

traits.locale_text: [Onu infaz et] Albay İzdrig Batoshski; iğrenç bir şekilde ayrılıkçılıktan, Terra'ya itaatsizlikten ve yeminini bozma saygısızlığından suçlu bulundun. Seni ölüme mahkûm ediyorum."

languages.text: [Exekutieren] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, Ihr seid der verbrecherischen Sezession, der blasphemischen Insubordination gegenüber Terra und des Sakrilegs der Eidbrüchigkeit angeklagt. Dafür verurteile ich Euch hiermit zum Tode."
languages.original_text: [Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

traits.locale_text: [Exekutieren] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, Ihr seid der verbrecherischen Sezession, der blasphemischen Insubordination gegenüber Terra und des Sakrilegs der Eidbrüchigkeit angeklagt. Dafür verurteile ich Euch hiermit zum Tode."

languages.text: [Ejecutarlo] «Coronel Izdrig Batoshski, le acuso del espantoso delito de la secesión, la blasfemia de la insubordinación a Terra y el sacrilegio de romper su juramento. Por la presente, le condeno a morir».
languages.original_text: [Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

traits.locale_text: [Ejecutarlo] Coronel Izdrig Batoshski, le acuso del espantoso delito de la secesión, la blasfemia de la insubordinación a Terra y el sacrilegio de romper su juramento. Por la presente, le condeno a morir».

languages.text: 【处决他】“伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基上校，我指控你犯有分裂帝国的滔天罪行，对泰拉抗命不遵的亵渎之举，以及背弃誓言的渎神之罪。我在此判处你死刑。”
languages.original_text: [Execute him] "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, I charge you with the foul crime of secession, the blasphemy of insubordination to Terra, and the sacrilege of breaking your oath. I hereby sentence you to death."

traits.locale_text: 【处决他】“伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基上校，我指控你犯有分裂帝国的滔天罪行，对泰拉抗命不遵的亵渎之举，以及背弃誓言的渎神之罪。我在此判处你死刑。”
